issues.description:
## SKILL IMPORT: growth-loop-designer

**Source:** https://github.com/VoltAgent/awesome-claude-code-subagents/blob/main/categories/08-business-product/growth-loops.md
**License:** MIT ✓
**Stars:** 20,988 (VoltAgent/awesome-claude-code-subagents)

## What it does
Designs self-reinforcing product growth loops (viral, content/SEO, product-led) and calculates viral coefficient K. Helps teams move from funnel thinking to compounding loop mechanics.

## Proposed Multica skill name
`growth-loop-designer`

## PR-ready spec
- **Purpose:** Design and evaluate product growth loops for any SaaS/consumer product
- **Trigger:** User mentions growth loop, PLG, flywheel, viral coefficient, sustainable acquisition
- **Input:** Product description, current acquisition channels, target user persona
- **Steps:** (1) Classify current model (funnel vs loop); (2) Identify 3 candidate loop types (viral, SEO/content, product-led); (3) Estimate viral coefficient K for each; (4) Recommend loop with highest fit + lowest activation cost; (5) Output growth loop diagram in text + implementation prerequisites
- **Output:** Loop type selection, K-factor estimate, implementation checklist, red flags
- **Quality checklist:** Loop is named, K > 0 is justified, at least one counter-signal considered, no vanity metrics in output
- **Tools:** Read, Write only

## Distinct from existing skill
`growth-launch-plan` covers launch tactics (one-time event). This skill covers compounding mechanics (ongoing system). Different lifecycle stage, no overlap.

## Acceptance Criteria
- SKILL.md written per Multica skill format
- Skill triggers correctly on: 'growth loop', 'PLG', 'flywheel', 'viral loop', 'K factor'
- Output includes: loop type, K-factor estimate, 3-step activation path
- Does not duplicate content from growth-launch-plan

## Dependencies
- Security review sub-issue must be in `done` with `decision=green` before this is promoted to `todo`

## Risk
- Low: MIT license, pure text instructions, no executable code

## Definition of Done
- [ ] SKILL.md authored and merged to skill library
- [ ] Skill registered in workspace
- [ ] Trigger tested on 2 sample prompts
- [ ] No overlap with growth-launch-plan confirmed
issues.title: SKILL IMPORT: growth-loop-designer
